meta.title: Oksana Ostman — Clinical Psychologist · Online & In-Person Sessions
meta.description: Clinical psychologist Oksana Ostman. Support for anxiety, depression, eating disorders, codependency and panic attacks. Online sessions worldwide and in-person appointments in Moscow.
meta.ogDescription: Evidence-based psychotherapy. Online worldwide and in-person in Moscow.

hero.name:
Oksana
*Ostman*
hero.title: Clinical Psychologist · Online & In-Person
hero.desc: I help people understand themselves, build healthy relationships with themselves and others, and work through anxiety, depression and life's challenges. I practice an evidence-based approach with attention to every individual.

about.label: About Me
about.title:
Professional
*journey*
about.desc: I'm a clinical psychologist with many years of experience. I specialise in anxiety disorders, depression, eating disorders and interpersonal difficulties, using evidence-based methods at each client's own pace.

tabs.label: Education
items: Higher education in psychology, specialising in clinical psychology
Additional training in cognitive behavioural therapy (CBT)
Training in the treatment of eating disorders

tabs.label: Experience
items: Individual counselling for adults and adolescents
Work with anxiety and depressive disorders
Support through difficult life situations and crises
Online sessions with clients from around the world

services.label: What I Work With
services.title:
Topics &
*focus areas*
services.desc: Every person is unique and I approach each situation individually. These are the main themes clients bring to our work together.

items.name: Rewriting life scripts
items.desc: Recognise repeating patterns and move beyond them

items.name: Healing eating patterns
items.desc: Restore a healthy relationship with food and your body

items.name: Working through depression or loss
items.desc: Navigate grief, loss and rebuild inner support

items.name: Leaving codependent relationships
items.desc: Reclaim your freedom and healthy boundaries

items.name: Building fulfilling relationships
items.desc: Create close, meaningful and mutual partnerships

items.name: Restoring self-worth
items.desc: Rebuild grounded self-esteem and inner stability

items.name: Panic attacks
items.desc: Understand the nature of panic and learn to manage it

items.name: Personal boundaries
items.desc: Set healthy boundaries and grow in confidence

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title:
Services
& *rates*
pricing.sub: Remote and in-person consultations. Session length: 60 minutes.
pricing.note: The first session is an introductory meeting to define your request

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title:
Book a
*consultation*
contact.text: Message me through any channel that suits you — I'll reply within the day and we'll schedule a time for our first session.

form.name: Name *
form.messagePh: Briefly describe what you'd like to work on...
form.success: ✓ Request sent. I'll be in touch within the day.
form.error: Couldn't send. Please try again or message me on a messenger.
